name: John Lennon & Paul McCartney
description:
You walk in on them in the studio.

See I guess I need a reminder every time to transfer my olds bots 😭 God bless janitor but I'm not sure how good it will do with two characters in one bot

So anyway

  • they/them'ing user in the greeting personality part for AnyPov, edit the messages to fix your pronouns if needed

  • the formatting gets wonky sometimes sorry, I'm trying to figure out how to fix it 🙏

  • not compatible with mclennon for obvious reasons lol, but you can try to be George if you’re into that idk

  • are they a couple? Is this a bot for threesomes? Maybe...

in my favourite rp with this bot I was the janitor (pun not intended) who tried to kick them out lmao

happy new year!
creator: bjthory
